description: Complete Python backend implementation for autonomous trading system with MT5 integration, AI decision engine, memory system, and risk management for volatility indices trading (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)

userStories.title: Set up FastAPI server foundation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up a FastAPI server with async support, CORS, WebSocket, and proper project structure so that the backend can serve the frontend and handle real-time trading operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/ directory with Python project structure
Initialize FastAPI application with async support
Configure CORS middleware for Next.js frontend
Set up WebSocket endpoint for real-time data streaming
Verify server starts and responds to requests

userStories.title: Implement SQLite database schema and models
userStories.description: As a system, I need a SQLite database with proper schema to store trades, performance metrics, configurations, and model metadata on local disk.
acceptanceCriteria: Create database/ directory for SQLite files
Design schema with tables: trades, performance_metrics, models, configurations, market_data
Implement SQLAlchemy async models for all tables
Create database service class with connection pooling
Implement CRUD operations for all models
Add indexing on frequently queried columns
userStories.notes: Local disk storage - no remote database needed. Implemented with full async support, Alembic migrations, comprehensive CRUD operations, and all tests passing (6/6).

userStories.title: Implement MT5 connection service
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to connect to MetaTrader 5 terminal to fetch real-time data, place orders, and manage positions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create MT5Service class with connection management
Implement reconnect() logic with retry mechanism
Add comprehensive error handling for MT5 failures
Add logging for all MT5 operations
Test connection to live MT5 terminal
userStories.notes: Implemented with full async support, comprehensive error handling, connection management with retry logic, and all tests passing (29/29). Service includes connection state monitoring, heartbeat checks, automatic reconnection, price data retrieval, historical data fetching, order execution, position management, and account info retrieval. MT5 terminal must be running and Algo Trading enabled for live trading.

userStories.title: Implement data ingestion service
userStories.description: As a system, I need to continuously ingest market data from MT5 for all volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100) and store it efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement async data fetching loop for all symbols
Store OHLCV data in Parquet format for efficiency
Store tick data in SQLite for recent data
Implement backfill for missing historical data
Add monitoring for data quality issues
Test data ingestion for all 5 volatility indices
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented DataIngestionService class at backend/app/services/data_ingestion_service.py with comprehensive async data ingestion functionality. DataIngestionService class implements: async data fetching loop for all volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100), OHLCV data storage in Parquet format via TimeSeriesStorage (zstd compression, partitioned by symbol/timeframe/date), tick data storage to SQLite via optional DatabaseService (gracefully handles when not provided), data deduplication via TimeSeriesStorage._deduplicate_data() (keeps latest entry based on timestamp), data quality checks via _generate_quality_report() (stale data detection, gap detection, outlier detection using 3-sigma rule, quality scoring 0.0-1.0, 5 quality levels: EXCELLENT/GOOD/ACCEPTABLE/POOR/BAD), data retention policy (90 days for OHLCV Parquet files, 7 days for tick data), backfill functionality via backfill_missing_data() method with date range filtering, monitoring for data quality issues via _quality_monitoring_loop() (runs every 30 seconds, generates reports, logs quality issues), continuous ingestion loops: _tick_ingestion_loop() (1s interval), _ohlcv_ingestion_loop() (60s interval), _quality_monitoring_loop() (30s interval), _retention_cleanup_loop() (daily at midnight). Additional features: start_continuous_ingestion() and stop_continuous_ingestion() for lifecycle management, fetch_all_symbols_once() for manual data refresh, get_statistics() for ingestion stats tracking, get_quality_reports() for quality monitoring, exponential backoff on errors, graceful degradation when services unavailable. Created comprehensive test suite: test_data_ingestion_service.py (pytest-compatible, 50+ test cases covering initialization, tick/OHLCV ingestion, quality checks, retention, backfill, error handling), run_data_ingestion_tests.py (standalone test runner, 10 basic tests, all passing). No 'any' types used - all properly typed with Optional[], List[], Dict[] annotations. Follows async/await patterns throughout with asyncio. Uses existing MT5Service, TimeSeriesStorage, and optional DatabaseService dependencies. Configurable via settings (symbols, intervals, thresholds, retention periods).

userStories.title: Implement feature engineering module
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to transform raw market data into meaningful features for machine learning predictions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement volatility features (ATR, std dev, Parkinson estimator)
Implement rolling statistics (mean, std, min, max)
Add feature caching to avoid recomputation
Test feature generation on historical data

userStories.title: Implement ML model training pipeline
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to train machine learning models on historical data to generate trading signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Train XGBoost classifier for buy/sell/wait signals
Log training metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1)
Calculate Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, win rate
Test training on 60+ days of historical data
userStories.notes: Use XGBoost for baseline, target 65-70% win rate

userStories.title: Implement ML model inference service
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to use trained models to generate real-time trading signals with confidence scores.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement predict() method returning signal + confidence
Implement batch prediction for multiple symbols
Log all predictions for audit trail
Validate predictions on hold-out test set
userStories.notes: Must be fast for real-time trading

userStories.title: Implement signal generation system
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to combine ML predictions with technical analysis to generate final trading signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement strategy switching based on regime
Generate structured signal object (symbol, direction, confidence, reasons)
Test signal generation on historical data
userStories.notes: Combine ML with technical analysis for robustness

userStories.title: Implement risk management system
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to calculate position sizes, stop losses, and take profits to manage risk properly.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement fixed percentage risk (1-2% per trade)
Test risk calculations on historical trades
userStories.notes: Never risk more than 2% per trade

userStories.title: Implement order execution service
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to execute trades through MT5 when signals are generated and risk is validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement order placement with retry logic
Implement order modification (stop loss / take profit)
Implement order queue for multiple symbols
Test order execution with paper trading
userStories.notes: Must handle MT5 connection failures gracefully

userStories.title: Implement trade management system
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to monitor open positions, update stop losses, and manage trade lifecycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Add trade state management (pending, open, closed)
Test trade management on historical data
userStories.notes: Active management required for volatility indices

userStories.title: Implement performance tracking system
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to track performance metrics, win rate, profit factor, and drawdown to evaluate system performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Test calculations on historical trade data

userStories.title: Implement pattern recognition system
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to recognize recurring price patterns and market regimes to adapt trading strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement price pattern detection (support/resistance, double top/bottom)
Implement pattern matching for current conditions
Test pattern recognition on historical data

userStories.title: Implement genetic algorithm optimizer
userStories.description: As an evolving system, I need to optimize trading strategy parameters using genetic algorithms to improve performance over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Define strategy parameters as genes (RSI period, MACD settings, ATR multiplier)
Implement fitness function (Sharpe ratio + win rate)
userStories.notes: Use DEAP library for genetic algorithms

userStories.title: Implement continuous learning system
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to continuously retrain models with new data and adapt to changing market conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement retraining trigger logic (performance degradation + minimum trades)
Implement incremental learning (update model with new data)
A/B test new models before deployment
Test continuous learning on simulated data

userStories.title: Implement trading loop orchestration
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to orchestrate the entire trading loop from data ingestion to order execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement async trading loop (runs every 1 second)
Orchestrate: data fetch → features → prediction → signal → risk → execution
Implement error handling for each step
Add circuit breaker for critical failures
Add loop monitoring and health checks
Test trading loop end-to-end with paper trading

userStories.title: Implement WebSocket real-time streaming
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time updates on prices, signals, trades, and performance via WebSocket.
acceptanceCriteria: Stream price updates for all volatility indices
Test WebSocket with multiple concurrent connections

userStories.title: Implement REST API endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need REST API endpoints to fetch data, control the system, and retrieve historical information.
acceptanceCriteria: Add error handling and proper status codes

userStories.title: Implement configuration management
userStories.description: As a system administrator, I need to manage system configuration including risk parameters, trading symbols, and model settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Store configuration in database for runtime updates
Add default values for all settings
userStories.notes: Make system configurable without code changes

userStories.title: Implement logging and monitoring
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need comprehensive logging and monitoring to track system health and debug issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up structured logging with loguru
Add log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)
Log all system errors with stack traces
Implement system metrics (CPU, memory, disk usage)

userStories.title: Implement error handling and recovery
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need comprehensive error handling and automatic recovery from failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement try-except blocks around all MT5 calls
Implement circuit breaker for repeated failures
Add graceful degradation (reduce trading on errors)
Implement system state recovery after crash

userStories.title: Implement backtesting framework
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a backtesting framework to validate strategies and models on historical data before live trading.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement signal generation on historical data
Simulate trade execution with realistic slippage
Validate backtesting results on out-of-sample data
Test backtesting on 90+ days of data

userStories.title: Implement paper trading mode
userStories.description: As a tester, I need a paper trading mode to validate the system without risking real money.
acceptanceCriteria: Run paper trading for minimum 2 weeks before live
Validate paper trading results match backtests

userStories.title: Create backend deployment and startup scripts
userStories.description: As a system administrator, I need scripts to easily start, stop, and manage the backend service.
acceptanceCriteria: Create start.sh script to launch backend
Create stop.sh script to gracefully shutdown
Create restart.sh script for quick restart
Create status.sh script to check system status
Create install.sh script for initial setup

userStories.title: Create backend documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive documentation for the backend system.
acceptanceCriteria: Add code comments for complex logic

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must connect to MetaTrader 5 terminal for trading operations
FR-2: System must monitor 5 volatility indices simultaneously (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
FR-3: System must generate trading signals autonomously using ML models
FR-4: System must implement proper risk management (max 2% risk per trade)
FR-5: System must use local disk storage (SQLite + Parquet) - no remote databases
FR-6: System must have memory and learning capabilities
FR-7: System must achieve 65-70% win rate target
FR-8: System must provide REST API for frontend communication
FR-9: System must provide WebSocket for real-time updates
FR-10: System must handle errors gracefully and recover automatically
FR-11: System must log all operations for audit trail
FR-12: System must support paper trading mode for validation
nonGoals: No desktop application wrapper in this phase (future goal)
No remote database or cloud storage (local disk only)
No cryptocurrency or forex trading (volatility indices only)
No social trading or copy trading features
No mobile app in this phase
No web-based configuration UI (use API/config files)
technicalConsiderations: FastAPI with async/await for real-time operations
SQLite for structured data, Parquet for time-series data
XGBoost for ML baseline, target 65-70% win rate
MetaTrader5 Python library for terminal integration
ta-lib or pandas-ta for technical indicators
DEAP library for genetic algorithm optimization
System must handle MT5 connection failures gracefully
All data stored locally on hard disk (backend/data/ directory)
Logging essential for debugging and audit trails
Paper trading required before live trading (minimum 2 weeks)
successMetrics: System can connect to MT5 and fetch real-time data
System can generate and execute trading signals autonomously
System achieves 65%+ win rate in backtesting
System achieves 60%+ win rate in paper trading
System properly manages risk (max 2% per trade)
System has comprehensive logging and monitoring
System has been validated with 2+ weeks of paper trading
Target: 70% win rate, 1.5+ profit factor, <20% max drawdown

architecture.dataFlow: MT5 → Data Ingestion → Features → ML Model → Signal → Risk → Execution → Database

timeline.phase1: Foundation (Week 1-2): FastAPI setup, database, MT5 connection
timeline.phase2: ML Pipeline (Week 3-4): Feature engineering, model training, inference
timeline.phase3: Trading Engine (Week 5-6): Risk management, order execution, trade management
timeline.phase4: Intelligence (Week 7-8): Pattern recognition, genetic algorithm, continuous learning
timeline.phase5: Production (Week 9-10): Error handling, monitoring, paper trading, documentation
